_comment: Wage on-costs for the dashboard P&L. The dashboard uses owner_weekly_inc_super for the corp-payroll line and computes payroll tax + workers-comp LIVE as lumpy actuals (group_payroll - staff wages - owners), NOT from oncost_rate. oncost_rate is retained for reference only. Zak, 2026-07-18: 'don't estimate ... treat them as lumpy expenses'.
_note_rate_unused: oncost_rate is informational. The dashboard does not apply a rate to wages; payroll tax + WC flow through as actual dollars, smoothed over trailing 3 months like every other lumpy overhead.
